svg.text: VanArsdel Sales Performance Dashboard - Wireframe Overview
Business mockup for DA build: each visual has annotation plus a non-overlapping chart/table placeholder.
Leadership summary: what changed, where performance comes from, and where to drill.
Slicers: Year | Quarter/Month | Category | Region | Traffic Channel
Power BI Matrix visual: Category > Segment
Shows expand/collapse, subtotal, Revenue, GP, GM %
Category managers identify portfolio winners, margin issues, and SKU detail.
Slicers: Year | Category | Segment | Region | Traffic Channel
Bar hierarchy: Revenue by Category -> Segment
Indented drill rows plus subtotal; values: Revenue, Units, ASP, GM %
Marketing sees channel/device revenue, customer reach, and digital/offline mix.
Slicers: Year | Traffic Channel | Device | Category | Region
Bar: Revenue by Channel and Device
Power BI Matrix: Channel x Device
Values: Revenue, Units, Customers, Share %, GM %
Sales Ops finds strong/weak regions, states, and districts for action.
Slicers: Year | Region | State | Category | Traffic Channel
Location: State or City; Country = USA
Bar: Revenue by Region then State
Power BI Matrix: Region > State > District
Values: Revenue, Units, Customers, GM %, YoY %
Expandable rows, state subtotal, conditional GM/YoY colors
FP&A tracks actual-vs-budget only where actuals overlap; 2021 plan is separate.
Combo: Actual Revenue vs Budget by Month
Power BI Matrix: Category > Segment by Month
Expandable rows, total row, red/green variance cells
Build note: placeholders are intentionally separated from labels. Keep real visuals below annotation or in a separate plot area.
